name: Widgets
description: Dashboard widgets on a shared WidgetCard shell (header icon+title+action, inset divider, body), each with a populated and an empty variant (empties reuse the EmptyState illustrations). HR Management (14): TimeOff, CurrentProject, StatusTracker, Notes, Schedule, TimeTracker, EmployeeSpotlight, DailyFeedback, WorkHourAnalysis, Courses, DailyWorkHours, TrainingAnalysis, CourseProgress, EmployeeRating. Finance & Banking (16): StockMarketTracker, MyCards, MyCardsVertical, SpendingSummary, Exchange, CurrencyList, RecentTransactions, MySubscriptions, QuickTransfer, DonationProfile, SavedActions, TotalBalance, TotalExpenses, MajorExpenses, CreditScore, BudgetOverview.
financeSourceNote: Finance & Banking widgets ported from Figma node 3963:7181 (Widgets [Finance & Banking] [1.1], 32 symbols = 16 types x Empty State Off/On). Implemented from a single get_metadata call — the user provided the widget screenshots directly, so no get_screenshot/get_design_context calls were spent on visuals. Reuses the WidgetCard shell + SegmentedControl/Badge/CircularProgressBar/Avatar/EmptyState primitives. New shared helpers: AccountCard (credit-card face) and CountryFlag (round flag loaded from src/assets/Country Flags/ by name). Charts (stock line+tooltip, balance area, expense sparkline, horizontal bars, 2-segment spending gauge, credit-score segmented bar, 12-month stacked Budget Overview) are inline SVG/CSS.
sourceNote: Ported from Figma node 3851:32690 (Widgets [HR Management] [1.1], 28 symbols = 14 types x Empty State Off/On). To conserve Figma MCP calls this was implemented from one metadata call + one high-resolution frame screenshot (cropped/zoomed locally with PIL, no per-widget MCP calls) plus the existing component library, rather than per-symbol get_design_context. Every widget is a composition of existing primitives (SegmentedControl, ProgressBar, CircularProgressBar, Avatar, AvatarGroup, Badge, EmptyState) on a shared WidgetCard shell. Empty ('Empty State=On') variants reuse the EmptyState illustration set added alongside this work. Two shared helpers live in WidgetCard.tsx: WidgetGauge (a 180° semicircle gauge for Time Off) and BrandLogo (loads a logo from src/assets/Brand/Brand Logos/ by file name, used for Monday.com/Loom/Evernote). The header 'See All'/'Details' buttons and the Daily Feedback 'Next Question' button use header-local styles (soft-200 border + x-small shadow + sub text) matching Figma, since no existing Button variant matches that treatment.

parts.note: Reusable widget sub-components, each ported from its own Figma frame and composed back into the widgets above.
components: NoteItem (Figma 3872:24017 — a single note row, Default/Checked)
EmployeeSpotlightTabs (Figma 3849:31700 — Overview/Comments/Rewards panel with the blue rosette badge; decorative rosette SVGs live in src/assets/Spotlight/)
ScheduleDetailTabs (Figma 3710:12493 — tabbed card list + per-tab empty state)

empty.note: Switches to the Empty State=On variant
